title: Button color flash when open a market with an open position
acceptance_criteria: Navigating to a market with an open position shows Close Position / Modify immediately — no Long/Short flash visible
Navigating to a market with NO position shows Long/Short immediately — no flash
If position data cannot be available synchronously, a skeleton/loading state is shown — never the wrong buttons
No regression: close, modify, add collateral flows work correctly after the fix

steps.description: Verify at least one open position exists
Navigate to BTC market detail (has open position)
No BUG_MARKER in Metro logs (Long/Short buttons should not appear for market with position)
Account state is loaded (no flash to empty)
Capture market detail with existing position (should show Close/Modify)
